test_cases.name: health_check_returns_ok
test_cases.description: Verify that the health check endpoint returns a 200 status code indicating the service is up.

test_cases.name: create_author_success
test_cases.description: Create a new author with valid data (name, bio, born_year) and verify the response contains the author details.

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_name_returns_422
test_cases.description: Attempt to create an author without the required 'name' field and verify a 422 validation error is returned.

test_cases.name: list_authors_with_pagination
test_cases.description: List authors using skip and limit parameters and verify the response is an array of authors.

test_cases.name: get_author_by_id_success
test_cases.description: Retrieve an existing author by their ID and verify the response contains the correct author data.

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author_returns_404
test_cases.description: Attempt to retrieve an author with an ID that does not exist and verify a 404 error is returned.

test_cases.name: update_author_with_etag_success
test_cases.description: Update an existing author's name using a valid If-Match header and verify the response reflects the changes.

test_cases.name: delete_author_without_books_success
test_cases.description: Delete an author who has no associated books and verify a 204 No Content response.

test_cases.name: create_category_success
test_cases.description: Create a new category with a unique name and verify the response contains the category details.

test_cases.name: create_duplicate_category_returns_409
test_cases.description: Attempt to create a category with a name that already exists and verify a 409 Conflict error is returned.

test_cases.name: get_category_by_id_success
test_cases.description: Retrieve an existing category by its ID and verify the response contains the correct category data.

test_cases.name: create_book_success
test_cases.description: Create a new book with all required fields (title, isbn, price, published_year, author_id, category_id) and verify the response.

test_cases.name: create_book_duplicate_isbn_returns_409
test_cases.description: Attempt to create a book with an ISBN that already exists and verify a 409 Conflict error is returned.

test_cases.name: list_books_with_filters
test_cases.description: List books with search, author_id, and price range filters and verify the response is a paginated list.

test_cases.name: get_book_by_id_success
test_cases.description: Retrieve an existing book by its ID and verify the response contains the full book details including author and category.

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book_returns_410
test_cases.description: Attempt to retrieve a book that has been soft-deleted and verify a 410 Gone error is returned.

test_cases.name: update_book_with_etag_success
test_cases.description: Update an existing book's price using a valid If-Match header and verify the response reflects the changes.

test_cases.name: soft_delete_book_success
test_cases.description: Soft-delete an existing book and verify a 204 No Content response is returned.

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book_success
test_cases.description: Restore a previously soft-deleted book and verify the response contains the restored book data.

test_cases.name: create_review_success
test_cases.description: Create a review for an existing book with rating and reviewer_name and verify the response.

test_cases.name: get_book_rating_with_reviews
test_cases.description: Retrieve the average rating for a book that has reviews and verify the response contains average_rating and review_count.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_old_book_success
test_cases.description: Apply a valid discount percentage to a book published more than 1 year ago and verify the discounted price is calculated.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_new_book_returns_400
test_cases.description: Attempt to apply a discount to a book published within the last year and verify a 400 Bad Request error is returned.

test_cases.name: update_stock_positive_delta_success
test_cases.description: Increase the stock of a book by a positive quantity and verify the new stock value is correct.

test_cases.name: update_stock_negative_delta_insufficient_returns_400
test_cases.description: Attempt to decrease the stock of a book by more than the current stock and verify a 400 Bad Request error is returned.

test_cases.name: upload_cover_image_success
test_cases.description: Upload a valid JPEG image as a book cover and verify the response contains the file metadata.

test_cases.name: upload_cover_unsupported_type_returns_415
test_cases.description: Attempt to upload a file with an unsupported MIME type (e.g., text/plain) and verify a 415 Unsupported Media Type error is returned.

test_cases.name: create_tag_success
test_cases.description: Create a new tag with a unique name and verify the response contains the tag details.

test_cases.name: create_order_success
test_cases.description: Create a new order with valid customer data and a book item with sufficient stock, and verify the order is created with pending status.

test_cases.name: create_order_insufficient_stock_returns_400
test_cases.description: Attempt to create an order with a quantity exceeding the available stock and verify a 400 Bad Request error is returned.
